description.ko: 네온 불빛과 빗줄기가 어우러져 활기차고 분위기 있는 테크 누아르 풍경을 만들어내는 미래 도시의 낭만적인 우울함을 깊이 있게 탐구합니다.
description.en: A deep dive into the romantic melancholy of a futuristic city, where neon lights and rain merge to create a vibrant, atmospheric tech-noir landscape.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Rainy Holo-Plaza.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are adorned with massive 3D holograms of koi fish swimming in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan light. Heavy monsoon rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on wet metallic asphalt and glass walkways. Flying maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through the dense volumetric fog and smog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced reflections, 8k resolution, capturing a moody and romantic futuristic urban atmosphere.
